texto: The true way to be humble is not to stoop until you are smaller than yourself but to stand at your real height against some higher nature that will show you what the real smallness of your greatest greatness is.
explicacao: Citação de Phillip Brooks sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The true way to be humble is not to stoop until you are smaller than yourself but to stand at you…” articula reflexao, humility, humble em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
